# Copilot Instructions Index

This folder contains modular copilot instructions for the Voicory project. Each file focuses on a specific topic for easier maintenance and reference.

## Core Development

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [00-overview.md](./00-overview.md) | AI role, workflow, and root cause analysis |
| [01-code-quality.md](./01-code-quality.md) | TypeScript, ESLint, testing standards |
| [02-security.md](./02-security.md) | Security requirements (NON-NEGOTIABLE) |
| [10-quick-reference.md](./10-quick-reference.md) | Pitfalls, checklists, quick reference |

## Architecture & Infrastructure

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [03-architecture.md](./03-architecture.md) | Stack, data flow, file structure, scaling |

| [09-deployment.md](./09-deployment.md) | CI/CD, Cloud Run, Vercel deployment |

## Quick Start

For most development tasks, start with:
1. **[00-overview.md](./00-overview.md)** - Understand the workflow
2. **[10-quick-reference.md](./10-quick-reference.md)** - Pitfalls & checklists
3. **Relevant topic file** - Based on what you're working on
